title: roblox texture pack
description: A great texture pack for building towers in Roblox.
body:
- (日本語)みなさんはrobloxのタワーを作った時に、テクスチャーがしょぼいと思ったことはありませんか？ けれども、作り方がわからない...そんなときはこのテクスチャーパックが活躍します。このテクスチャーパックはrobloxのタワーを作るのにいいテクスチャーパックです。
- (English)Have you ever built a Roblox tower and thought the texture was crappy? But you don't know how to make it... This texture pack is perfect for that. This texture pack is a great texture pack for building Roblox towers.
(preview)↓<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/U-daisYTThk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
- The stick becomes the hitting hand!!![hitting hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd5c3738046d0ec00dd64943604fabb3aebd6fbe_0.webp)
